text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, May 30. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
